title: Aries SMPStart
description: Aries SMPStart Is A Simple Plugin Used To Manage The Start Of SMP!
body:
# 🛠 Aries SMPStart Plugin
Aries SMPStart is a Paper plugin that helps you manage the **beginning of an SMP** with two distinct phases and useful controls.
## 🌍 Phases
### Starting Phase
- Border is small (configurable)
- PvP is disabled
- Players cannot break blocks
- Peaceful environment to let everyone get ready
### Started Phase
- Border expands to a larger configurable size
- PvP gets enabled after an optional timer
- The SMP officially begins
# ⌨️ Commands
**/smpstart center** Set the world spawn and border center to your location

**/smpstart starting** Switch back to the starting phase (PvP off, small border)

**/smpstart starting border <size>** Set the border size for the starting phase

**/smpstart start Start the SMP** (expands the border and enables PvP after timer or instantly)

**/smpstart start border <size>** Set the border size for the started phase (can extend it even after SMP has started)
# ⚙️ Configurable Options
**smp-name** → Name of your SMP **pvp-delay.enabled** → Enable or disable PvP countdown **pvp-delay.seconds** → Time in seconds before PvP turns on **borders.starting-size** → Starting phase border size **borders.start-size** → Started phase border size **borders.transition-seconds** → Time it takes for border to expand **starting-phase.difficulty** → World difficulty in starting phase **starting-phase.gamemode** → Player gamemode in starting phase starting-phase.disable-mob-spawning → Toggle mob spawning in starting phase **started-phase.difficulty** → World difficulty in started phase **started-phase.gamemode** → Player gamemode in started phase **start-countdown.enabled** → Enable or disable the 3-2-1 countdown before SMP start
# 🎮 Features
- Easy phase switching between starting and started
- Fully configurable borders, PvP rules, gamemodes, and difficulties
- Option for PvP delay with a visible countdown
- Simple and clean commands (OP/console only)
